name: discord-bot
description: Parse Discord requests to tickets and link Notion deliverables

commands.name: parse
commands.example: python skills/discord-bot/check.py parse --request "create a ticket for updating my resume"

commands.name: link
commands.description: Link Notion page to Linear ticket (SEM-47)

commands.name: create-deliverable
commands.description: Create Notion deliverable linked to ticket
commands.example: python skills/discord-bot/check.py create-deliverable --title "My Task" --database DB_ID --ticket-id TICKET_ID
